messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Drive swarm stop (drain/emergency), restart, and timed-pause from a guarded Telegram control topic (confirm-gated for stop/restart, owning-context executor)
What it solves: DELIVER STOP + RESTART AS ONE PARCEL; PAUSE FOLDED INTO THE SAME PARCEL.
The human explicitly chose atomic delivery ("never stranded") for the /stop +
/restart pair over the repo's incremental epic pattern: they ship together, and
/stop is NOT split out as a standalone shippable ticket. The 2026-07…
How it works: An authorised restart verb in the control topic posts a confirmation and executes nothing until confirmed
